reasoning: CLEAN_BULL ribbon with 63-cent spread and price 22c above pivot (711.84 vs 711.62 pivot) indicates solid bullish structure. Flat overnight gap (+0.26 = essentially no gap sentiment). VIX falling -1.53% supports the bullish tilt. Ribbon verdict dominates; bar weakness is secondary consolidation signal.
